ops.text: synckitd install (v0.14.0) fails to bootstrap com.github.yasyf.synckit.serve during an upgrade-in-place on BOTH Macs with "launchctl bootstrap ... exit status 5: Bootstrap failed: 5: Input/output error", leaving serve absent while helper+reconcile restart fine. Deterministic remediation both times: explicit `launchctl bootout gui/$UID/com.github.yasyf.synckit.serve` (returns "No such process") then `launchctl bootstrap gui/$UID ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.github.yasyf.synckit.serve.plist`. Looks like the install path bootstraps serve while the old instance is still draining its bootout — sk daemon/install.go should retry-or-wait on EIO the way it presumably does for the other agents. Hit 2026-07-14 deploying v0.13.0/v0.14.0.
